name: Compass Digital Acquisition Corp.
business: Compass Digital Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated on March 8, 2021 as a Cayman Islands exempted company, formed for the purpose of effecting a Business Combination with one or more businesses or entities. The company has not generated any operating revenues to date and does not expect to generate operating revenues until it consummates an initial Business Combination.

exposures.sentence: KMC, which is a global critical minerals and infrastructure company focused on acquiring, advancing and developing assets in the Americas with projects in Chile and the United States.

KMC made certain customary representations and warranties to us, as of the date of the KMC Merger Agreement and as of the Closing, including, among others, with respect to ... mining and desalination, including representations regarding the validity and good standing of certain Chilean mining concessions, and the necessary maritime concessions and permits for certain desalination facilities.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial Business Combination (Combination Period ends)
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) April 20, 2026, the end of our Combination Period, which is 54 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.

catalysts.event: Termination date under KMC Merger Agreement if closing does not occur
catalysts.sentence: the KMC Merger Agreement provides for termination, in each case by written notice from the terminating party to the other party: (i) by either party if the conditions to the Closing have not been satisfied (except as the result of an uncured breach by the terminating party or its affiliates) or waived and the Closing does not occur by June 30, 2026;
